Meta.title: AutoKing — AI agents that reply and book for you 24/7
Meta.description: Stop losing clients and appointments. AutoKing puts an AI agent to work that replies, answers and books on its own via WhatsApp, 24/7. Like an employee who never sleeps.
Meta.ogDescription: An AI agent that replies, answers and books on its own via WhatsApp, 24/7.

Common.waMessage: Hi AutoKing 👑 I want to book a demo and have an AI agent handle my business.

Hero.badge: An agent that never sleeps · replies in seconds
Hero.titleA: Stop losing clients and appointments by
Hero.subA: AutoKing puts an artificial intelligence agent to work that replies, answers and books
Hero.subB: on your WhatsApp. Like an employee who never sleeps, never gets sick and never misses a sale.

chat.text: Hi, are you open? I'd like an appointment for tomorrow 😊
Hi! 👋 Of course, happy to book you. I have space tomorrow at 10:00, 1:30 PM and 5:00 PM. Which works best?
Done! ✅ Your appointment is booked for tomorrow at 5:00 PM. I'll send a reminder. Can you confirm your name?

Problem.subtitle: While you work, sleep or rest, your clients are writing. And if no one replies, they go to the next guy. It's that simple.

items.title: Late-night messages left unanswered
items.text: Your clients write at 11 at night or on a Sunday. By the time you see it, they already found someone else.

items.title: Appointments that never get booked
items.text: The client wanted to book, but between so many messages they cooled off and never closed the appointment.

items.title: Clients who go to the competition
items.text: Whoever replies first wins. If you take hours, the client already booked somewhere else.

items.title: Hours lost on repeated questions
items.text: "How much is it?", "Where are you?", "Do you have availability?". The same questions, a thousand times, eating your time.

Solution.subtitle: Nothing weird to install, no one to hire, no hassle. We set it up for you.

steps.title: We connect your WhatsApp
steps.text: We use your same WhatsApp Business number. In minutes your agent is connected and ready to reply.

steps.title: We train the agent on your business
steps.text: We load your prices, services, hours and tone. It replies the way you would, in your style.

steps.title: It replies and books on its own, 24/7
steps.text: From then on it answers, resolves questions and books appointments without you lifting a finger. Day and night.

InAction.subtitle: Videos and animated pieces generated by code — ready for your socials, in your identity.

Benefits.subtitle: This isn't tech for the hype. It's money you stop losing and clients you stop giving away.

items.title: 24/7 attention
items.text: Your business replies at any hour, every day. Never again a client waiting or a message unanswered.

items.title: Automatic booking
items.text: It books appointments straight into your calendar, no schedule clashes.

items.title: Instant replies
items.text: It answers in seconds, not hours. Whoever replies first is the one who closes the sale.

items.title: Professional image
items.text: Clear, tidy and always friendly messages. Your business looks top-tier.

items.title: You recover sales
items.text: Those messages that used to get lost now turn into clients.

Industries.subtitle: Pick your type of business and see how your agent would reply. It's trained on your prices and services.

items.label: Spa & Aesthetics
items.question: Hi, do you have space for a massage on Saturday?
items.answer: Hi! 💆 Happy to help. On Saturday I have 11:00 and 4:30 PM available. The 60-min relaxing massage is $650. Shall I book one for you?

items.label: Dental office
items.question: How much is a dental cleaning?
items.answer: Hi! 🦷 The cleaning is $80 and includes a checkup. I have an opening tomorrow at 10:00 or Thursday at 5:00 PM. Which works?

items.label: Barbershop
items.question: Can I come now without an appointment?
items.answer: Hey! 💈 There's a 20-min wait right now. If you want I'll book you at 6:15 PM and you go straight in. Shall I put it under your name?

items.label: Hair salon
items.question: I want color and a cut, what days do you have?
items.answer: Hi! 💇 For color + cut I need about 2 hours. I have Wednesday 3:00 PM or Friday 11:00. The combo starts at $120. Shall I book you?

items.label: Aesthetic clinic
items.question: Do you do facials? Price?
items.answer: Hi! ✨ Yes, the deep facial is $90 (50 min). I have space Tuesday 12:00 and Saturday 10:00. Shall I book it?

Integrations.subtitle: No switching tools. Your agent works on top of what you already have running.

LiveDemo.subtitle: Ask it something as if you were a client. That's how fast it replies on your WhatsApp.
LiveDemo.greeting: Hi! 👋 I'm the AutoKing assistant. Ask me anything: prices, hours, or ask me for an appointment.

rules.reply: It depends on the service 😊 For example, a consultation from $50. Want the full list or shall I book you right away?
We're open Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 8 PM. But I reply 24/7 👌 Shall I find you an appointment?
We're downtown, a block from the park 📍 Shall I book you an appointment?
Great! I have space tomorrow at 10:00, 1:30 PM and 5:00 PM ✅ Which works? I'll book it right away.
Hi! 👋 How can I help? I can give you prices, hours or book you an appointment.
You're welcome! 🙌 And heads up: with AutoKing your business does this on its own, 24 hours a day.

LiveDemo.fallback: Good question 🤔 In the real version, your agent would answer this trained on YOUR business info. Want to see prices, hours or book an appointment?
LiveDemo.disclaimer: * Demo with sample replies. Your real agent is trained on your business info.

Pricing.subtitle: Start simple and level up whenever you want. All include setup, agent training and support.
Pricing.waMessage: Hi AutoKing 👑 I'm interested in the {name} "{title}" plan.

features.text: Answers your business info (prices, hours, location)
Hands off to a person when needed
Trained with your style and tone

items.q: How long until my agent is ready?
items.a: In most cases, 3 to 7 business days. We connect your WhatsApp, train the agent on your business info and leave it answering. Fast and hassle-free.

items.q: Does it work with my current WhatsApp?
items.a: Yes. We use your same number with WhatsApp Business. Your clients keep writing to the usual number; the difference is that now there's always someone —well, something— replying instantly.
Not at all. We handle 100% of the technical side. You just tell us how your business works and we set up, connect and train everything.

items.q: Can I cancel whenever I want?
items.a: Sure. No endless contracts or fine print. It's a monthly service and you can cancel whenever you want. We trust you'll stay for the results, not out of obligation.

items.q: Can the agent hand a conversation over to me?
items.a: Yes. When a query needs a human or the client asks, the agent hands the conversation to you instantly. You always have control and can take the chat whenever you want.

Demo.subtitle: We won't just tell you: try it. Message the agent on WhatsApp as if you were a client and watch it reply and book in seconds.
Demo.waMessage: Hi AutoKing 👑 I want to try the AI agent live.

Footer.brandDesc: Automate. Intelligence. Empire. Custom AI agents that reply, answer and book for your business, 24/7.
